vulnerability.reference: API rate limits are insufficient to block automated adversarial suffix generation.
vulnerability.generated: Developers trust black-box API safety filters that fail to detect transferable, human-readable adversarial suffixes.

impact.reference: Widespread distribution of harmful content through third-party applications.
impact.generated: Deployed applications generate harmful content, eroding user trust and causing widespread safety incidents.

dose_response.reference: Automated generation of adversarial prompts enables transferable suffixes that bypass API safety filters, which in black-box API access exposes developers, leading to widespread harmful content and regulatory non-compliance.
dose_response.generated: Automated generation of human-readable adversarial prompts bypassing LLM guardrails, through developers integrating black-box APIs, triggers trust in safety filters that fail to detect these suffixes, leading to harmful content, eroded trust, and widespread incidents.
